name: Progress List
goal: Stack multiple progress bars and arbitrary inline content into a vertically-gapped list with consistent spacing.
description: Flex-column layout container. Accepts ce-progress rows, narrative paragraphs, ce-callout annotations, and any other children. Gap between rows is controlled by the --ce-progress-list-gap custom property. No hard wrappers — any HTML child renders correctly (CDR-006).

slots.description: Any children: ce-progress rows, p, ce-callout, arbitrary HTML.
